nodes.name: Invoice Intake Input
nodes.notes: Replace the sample invoices with records from OCR, email parsing, form uploads, Google Drive, Dropbox, Airtable, or your accounting export. Do not include raw bank credentials or payment authorization data.

nodes.name: Validate and Score Invoices
nodes.notes: Normalizes invoice fields, checks required values, flags duplicates, detects low-confidence OCR/extraction, checks subtotal + tax against total, and assigns a review status.

nodes.name: Build Finance Review Queue
nodes.notes: Builds a sorted finance review queue and separates duplicate-risk, low-confidence, missing-PO, and low-value-ready items. This workflow does not approve or pay invoices.

assignments.name: reportTitle
assignments.value: ={{'Invoice Intake Review Queue - ' + $json.needsFixCount + ' need fixes of ' + $json.totalInvoices + ' invoices'}}

assignments.name: reportSummary
assignments.value: ={{'Reviewed ' + $json.totalInvoices + ' invoices. Needs fix: ' + $json.needsFixCount + '. Duplicate risk: ' + $json.duplicateRiskCount + '. Low confidence: ' + $json.lowConfidenceCount + '. Missing PO: ' + $json.missingPoCount + '.'}}

nodes.name: Final Finance Review Report
nodes.notes: Final structured report. Connect this to Slack, email, Notion, Airtable, Google Sheets, ClickUp, or an accounting review dashboard after validating your finance policy.

parameters.content:
## Invoice Intake Review Queue

Use this workflow after OCR, email parsing, or invoice upload steps. It turns extracted invoice records into a finance review queue with missing-field checks, duplicate-risk flags, low-confidence extraction flags, and approval candidates.

## Setup

1. Replace sample invoices in **Invoice Intake Input**.
2. Tune low-confidence and low-value thresholds.
3. Run manually before activating the weekly schedule.
4. Connect the final report to your review destination.

## Finance safety boundary

This workflow does not pay invoices, approve expenses, create accounting entries, or make tax decisions. It prepares a review queue so a human can verify documents, vendors, amounts, policies, and approvals.

## Common integrations

Add Gmail, Outlook, Google Drive, Dropbox, Airtable, Notion, Google Sheets, Slack, ClickUp, QuickBooks, Xero, or your OCR/parser upstream or downstream depending on your stack.
